overall.description: First-person exploration of a dimly lit, green-tiled medical facility or asylum in a horror video game. The player character walks through corridors, ascends stairs, discovers a body on a gurney in a blood-stained examination room, and explores adjacent cells with disturbing imagery.

scene_state.functional_zone: green-tiled institutional corridor with medical equipment

events.description: begins ascending metal staircase to upper level

agents.ego_description: walking through the ground floor corridor and climbing the metal stairs on the left side

entered.detail: dominant green ceramic tiles covering upper walls throughout the facility
white tiles covering lower wall sections in the corridor
metal handrail and stairs with green treads leading upward
blue rolling cart with metal frame and multiple shelves
empty black wheelchair parked against the wall

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a green-tiled institutional corridor with white lower walls, passing medical carts and a wheelchair. The environment is lit by overhead fluorescent lights as the player approaches and begins ascending a metal staircase on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level walkway overlooking the ground floor

events.description: emerges from stairwell onto upper walkway with metal railing overlooking the floor below
approaches darker doorway with visible blood stains on the wall inside

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper walkway toward the examination room door at the end of the hall

entered.detail: black metal safety railing overlooking the ground floor corridor below
glass door with metal frame leading to the medical examination room

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an upper walkway with a metal railing overlooking the ground floor, the player continues forward along the green-tiled corridor. The camera approaches a glass door revealing a dimly lit room beyond with visible blood stains on the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical examination room with surgical lighting

events.description: enters the examination room through the glass door into darker interior space
begins circling around the gurney to examine the body from different angles

agents.ego_description: entering the room and circling around the body on the gurney to closely examine the blood stains and corpse

entered.detail: mobile hospital bed with hydraulic lift mechanism
body wearing pink jacket and leopard print pants lying on the gurney
large dark red blood splatter on the wall above where the head rests
vital signs monitor with green digital display and other devices

segments.scene_description: Inside the examination room, the player circles a gurney holding a corpse in a pink jacket, illuminated by overhead surgical lights. Blood stains the wall above the body as medical equipment beeps nearby, and the camera moves around to examine the scene from multiple angles before exiting.

events.description: exits the examination room back into the green-tiled corridor
enters the padded cell with graffiti on the walls

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor past various rooms and entering a padded cell to observe the occupant sitting in the corner

notable_agents.action: man sitting in the corner of the padded cell with arms crossed, looking distressed

entered.detail: cell with 'NO REGRETS' written in red on the padded wall inside
room with off-white padded walls and a simple bed
white padded wall panels with black graffiti drawings and symbols

segments.scene_description: Back in the green corridor, the player passes a room with 'NO REGRETS' scrawled on the wall before approaching and entering a padded cell. Inside, a man sits in the corner with his arms crossed while graffiti covers the padded walls, and the player observes him from the doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sterile medical facility that descends from a clinical corridor into a series of disturbing patient rooms. It begins by moving through a green-tiled institutional hallway past medical carts and a wheelchair before ascending a metal staircase. As the camera emerges onto an upper walkway, it advances along the corridor toward a glass door that reveals a blood-stained examination room. The scene then shifts inside this room, circling a corpse in a pink jacket under surgical lights and amidst beeping equipment before retreating back into the hallway. Finally, the camera passes a wall scrawled with the words NO REGRETS and enters a padded cell to observe a man sitting in the corner surrounded by graffiti.
